lines.text: Rooms revenue of $42,000,000 recognized over the guest stay performance obligation per ASC 606 606-10-25-19, 606-10-55-91.
Loyalty program deferred revenue $3,200,000 with material right estimate $850,000 allocated per ASC 606 606-10-32-27, 606-10-55-42.
Gift card outstanding balance $1,100,000 with breakage estimate $165,000 recognized per ASC 606 606-10-55-48, 606-10-55-50.

Operating lease commitments — Y1 $4,200,000, Y2 $4,100,000, Y3 $4,000,000, Y4 $3,900,000, Y5 $3,800,000, thereafter $18,000,000; total undiscounted $38,000,000; less imputed interest $6,200,000; present value of operating lease liability $31,800,000 per ASC 842 842-20-50-6.
Franchise fee revenue: initial fees $2,400,000, ongoing royalties $4,800,000 recognized per ASC 952 952-605-25-1, 606-10-25-19.
USALI 12th Edition departmental schedules (rooms, food_and_beverage, other_operated) presented for informational operating metrics per ASC 925 925-10-50-1, USALI departmental schedules.
